name: Credit or Refund on Laid-off Wagers

eligibility.description: Available to taxpayers in the wagering business who can prove they did not collect the tax from the bettor or have repaid it.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows a credit or refund for wagering excise taxes when a taxpayer 'lays off' a wager with another person liable for the tax.
